title: Production Technician
description:
Job Description:

  • Perform assembly, testing, rework, inspection activities of in-house CUAS products accordance to work instructions, drawings, and production schedule
  • Perform housekeeping and work area to ensure neat and tidy working environment.
  • Work closely with the team on all production activities and other ad-hoc duties assigned
  • To support other processes/activities
  • Perform incoming checks of parts as per quality plan to ensure parts are within specification
  • Participate in projects undertaken by the team e.g
  • Process improvement project
  • Data collection on quality and productions
  • Supports in Project System Preparation, Testing, Operation and implementation.
  • Support in maintaining demonstration and marketing equipment.


Requirements:

  • NITEC, Higher NITEC or Diploma in Engineering
  • Pro-active, Positive attitude, Innovative, self-motivated and results oriented
  • Able to work both independently and as a team player
  • Good computer knowledge (Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, and Powerpoint)
  • Able to perform soldering work,
  • Working knowledge on basic Electronics and basic RF measurement
  • Time domain measurement - Voltage, Current, Power
  • Frequency domain measurement – RF Power, VSWR, and Bandwidth


Interested candidates can click on 'Apply' or send updated resume to victor.low@trd.sg


We are regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notify

postedCompany.description: TRD is a Singapore registered company which was set up in 2011 to initially provide consultancy and market development services for security and defense industries. Since 2015, TRD has been engaging deeply into the design, development and supply of stand-alone products and integrated systems to address the growing threat represented by the proliferation of drones. TRD is also representing several international Defense suppliers for jointly providing solutions to ASEAN customers. TRD comprises defense and security subject matters expert with decades of technical and military experience. Such expertise allows TRD to develop modular, integrated and proven solution, thanks to the support of a dedicated team of competent and innovative system engineers, production managers and after-sales support managers. TRD is proud today to count among its customers most of the ASEAN countries, countries in the Middle-East and Europe. TRD is proud to achieve ISO 9001:2015 standard on our Anti-Drone stand-alone and integrated systems in 2019.
postedCompany.name: TRD SYSTEMS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D21 Upper Bukit Timah, Clementi Park, Ulu Pandan
